MA Plan Benefit Finder

Medicare Advantage supplemental benefits lookup — PA, DE, MD, NJ

CMS PBP Data — CY 2026
💡 How to find a patient's plan in this tool ▾

Look at the patient's insurance card for the H-code (contract number) and plan number — usually printed near the plan name or in small text at the bottom. It looks something like H9532 049 or H3312-025.

Type it into the search bar as H9532_049 (with an underscore) and it should pull up the exact plan.

If you can't find the H-code, just search by the plan name or insurance company printed on the card — that'll usually narrow it down to a few options.

This tool shows whether a benefit exists on someone's plan — it doesn't always tell you the dollar amounts (like how much the OTC card is worth or how many meals are included). Those details are often blank in the CMS data and require checking the plan's Evidence of Coverage or calling the plan. But at least you'll know what to ask about before you pick up the phone.

🚗 Transport 💊 OTC Card 🍽️ Meals 🥦 SSBCI Food 🚌 SSBCI Transport 🏠 Home Mods 🤝 Support Svc 🧠 Addl MH Visits 💊 Part D

Data source: CMS Plan Benefit Package (PBP) Benefits 2026, released 10/1/2025.
Dollar amounts may be blank in PBP data — check the Evidence of Coverage for specifics.
SSBCI benefits require qualifying chronic conditions as determined by each plan.
Covers PA, DE, MD, and NJ plans. This tool is for reference only and does not constitute benefits verification.
